action.content: Here is a social media post: "My daughter graduated from college today! So proud of her!" Can you make it more exciting? Please make sure to expand it into exactly 2 paragraphs. Separate paragraphs with the markdown divider: ***. Additionally, italicize at least 3 sections by starting and ending with single *, i.e. *italic text*.
action.label: context

action.content:
My daughter just crossed that incredible finish line today, and my heart is absolutely bursting with pride! Watching her journey from a curious teenager to this brilliant, capable young woman has been the most rewarding experience of my life. *Every late night spent studying and every moment of doubt she overcame* has led to this triumphant moment of graduation, proving all her hard work was worth it.

***

The roar of the crowd and the tears of joy in the hallway are just the beginning of her amazing future. I know she is ready to conquer the world, armed with knowledge and an unshakeable spirit. *The future holds so many wonderful possibilities for her* as she steps out into the world, and I am cheering her on from the sidelines, ready to celebrate every single milestone she achieves ahead.
action.label: response
